# Mixtape — repo map (read this first)

Electron + TypeScript desktop app. YouTube Music library → MP3 files for iPod.
Single verify command: `npm run check` (typecheck + lint + vitest).

## Root
CLAUDE.md           agent entry point: arch map, commands, IPC table, conventions
AGENTS.md           tool-agnostic mirror of CLAUDE.md
llms.txt            this file — one-line repo map
README.md           minimal: what/run/build
package.json        deps + scripts
electron.vite.config.ts  vite config for main/preload/renderer
electron-builder.yml installer config (win nsis / mac dmg / linux AppImage)
scripts/fetch-binaries.ts  postinstall: downloads yt-dlp + ffmpeg into resources/bin/

## shared/
types.ts            Track, DownloadJob, Settings, ProgressEvent, ImportResult (zod schemas)

## src/main/ (Electron main process — Node.js)
index.ts            app lifecycle, BrowserWindow, single-instance, security settings
ipc.ts              all ipcMain.handle() registrations; zod-validates every payload
binaries.ts         resolve yt-dlp/ffmpeg paths (dev vs packaged)
import/takeout-csv.ts    parse Google Takeout CSV → Track[]
import/youtube-cookies.ts  yt-dlp --cookies-from-browser → Track[]
download/queue.ts        p-queue: concurrency + retry with exponential backoff
download/downloader.ts   spawn yt-dlp: extract audio → ffmpeg → ID3v2.3 MP3 + art
download/progress.ts     parse yt-dlp stdout → typed ProgressEvent

## src/preload/
index.ts            contextBridge: typed minimal API surface (window.mixtape)

## src/renderer/ (React + Tailwind)
main.tsx            ReactDOM.createRoot entry
App.tsx             state root, disclaimer check, page routing
index.css           Tailwind + theme variables
lib/ipc.ts          typed wrapper: window.mixtape → ipc.*
pages/Import.tsx    drag-drop CSV or browser connect UI
pages/Library.tsx   track list, checkboxes, folder picker, download trigger
pages/Downloads.tsx progress list, real-time updates via IPC push
pages/Settings.tsx  bitrate, concurrency, output folder, filename template
components/Button.tsx       variant-aware button
components/ProgressBar.tsx  animated progress bar
components/Badge.tsx        DownloadStatus badge
components/NavBar.tsx       tab navigation with badges
components/DisclaimerModal.tsx  first-run clickwrap

## docs/
ARCHITECTURE.md     import→library→queue→download→tagged-MP3 data flow + IPC boundary
DECISIONS.md        ADR log: local-not-hosted, Electron, 256kbps, exact-ID, no-Selenium

## Legal
DISCLAIMER.md       personal-use disclaimer
TERMS.md            terms of use
THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES  yt-dlp, ffmpeg (LGPL), React, Electron
NOTICE              trademark notice
LICENSE             MIT
